text: The proliferation of sophisticated terminology in this sentence renders it challenging for younger readers to comprehend.
source: The proliferation of sophisticated terminology in this sentence renders it challenging for younger readers to comprehend.
simplified_llama3: The words in this sentence are hard to understand.

text: This paragraph elucidates a complex scientific phenomenon using dense and highly technical language that may obscure the core idea.
source: This paragraph elucidates a complex scientific phenomenon using dense and highly technical language that may obscure the core idea.
simplified_llama3: This paragraph explains a complicated scientific idea using big words that might make it hard to understand.

text: The committee will reconvene next week to finalize the comprehensive proposal, carefully considering all prior feedback and potential implications.
source: The committee will reconvene next week to finalize the comprehensive proposal, carefully considering all prior feedback and potential implications.
